creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 163427
upgrade gimp, gimp-app and py-gimp to 2.8.16

https://mail.gnome.org/archives/gimp-developer-list/2015-November/msg00048.html

GIMP 2.8.16 has been released. The upgrade is nearly straight-forward.
This touches graphics/gimp, graphics/gimp-app and graphics/py-gimp. poudriere logs for these are included.
